args.subject: Summary of Client Meeting and Next Steps
args.body:
Dear John,

I hope this message finds you well. I'm sending a summary of our recent client meeting and wanted to confirm our next meeting.

Key points from our meeting on May 5, 2024:
- We discussed your requirements for the new project
- Agreed on the project timeline and key milestones
- Reviewed the initial design concepts and gathered your feedback

The next meeting is scheduled for June 1, 2024. I've attached the full meeting minutes for your reference.

Please let me know if you have any questions or need any clarification on the action items.

Best regards,

Emma Johnson
Blue Sparrow Tech
